request_payload.ai_prompt_hint: For each demographic group, state fail rate and withdrawal rate as percentages. Flag groups where fail+withdrawn > cohort threshold. Note: output is categorical final_outcome — distinct from A-G08 which uses continuous avg_score.
request_payload.actionable_question: Which demographic groups have the highest failure or dropout rate?

confidence.reason: 1998 students × 9 assessments across 8 weeks — strong statistical basis.

Keep this categorical and descriptive; do not target interventions by demographic group or reverse group rankings.
